
# 📜 Code of Conduct

## 🧠 Our Promise

We are committed to making this project a welcoming and respectful place for everyone.

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A[Respect] --> B[Inclusion]
    B --> C[Collaboration]
    C --> D[Healthy Community 🚀]
````

---

## 🤝 Expected Behavior

✔ Be respectful
✔ Be constructive
✔ Help others learn
✔ Give clear feedback

---

## ❌ Unacceptable Behavior

* Harassment or discrimination
* Personal attacks
* Toxic language
* Spam or irrelevant content

---

## 🛠️ Enforcement

Maintainers may:

* warn contributors
* remove content
* restrict participation

---

## 📩 Reporting

If you experience issues, open an issue or contact maintainers.

---

## 🏁 Final Thought

> “A great community builds great software.”
